---
title: SODA Seminar
subtitle: "**Policy evaluation using Transformer-based medical pathway embeddings**"
authors:
  - name: Meilame Tayebjee
    roles: writing
    corresponding: true
date: "2026-03-31"
date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
lang: en-GB
bibliography: references.bib
slide-number: true
number-sections: true
format: 
  revealjs: 
    theme: serif
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2   # show up to ## headings
    html-math-method: katex
    scrollable: true
    
css: custom.css
---

# Introduction

{{< include sections/1-intro.qmd >}}

# Transformer-based models for medical pathway embedding

{{< include sections/2-GPT.qmd >}}

# Off-Policy Evaluation 

{{< include sections/3-OPE.qmd >}}

# Avenues of work

{{< include sections/4-avenues.qmd >}}

# References {.unnumbered}

## {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
